class.name: JustAMCPResourceExecutor
class.brief_description: Lists and resolves resources exposed through the MCP resource API.

method.name: add_resource
method.description: Registers a [JustAMCPResource] instance so it appears in resource listings and can service matching read requests.

method.name: list_resource_templates
method.description: Returns the MCP resource templates registered with the executor. [param cursor] is accepted for protocol compatibility.

method.name: list_resources
method.description: Returns fixed MCP resources registered with the executor, including names, descriptions, URIs, and MIME types. [param cursor] is accepted for protocol compatibility.

method.name: read_resource
method.description: Finds the registered resource that matches [param uri], reads it, and returns its contents. Legacy [code]godot://[/code] URIs are canonicalized to [code]blazium://[/code] where supported.
